title: 2 Packs Wasp Trap, Reusable Wasp Trap Catcher Killers Outdoor Hanging for Yellow Jacket, Hornet and Bee Flying Insect Traps for Garden, Patio, Yard, Camping
bullet_points: 【Reusable Wasp Trap】 Regular cleaning is very convenient. The wasp traps made of durable transparent material only needs to be emptied after filling, soaked in warm soapy water for ten minutes to soften the residue, cleaned with a soft brush on the inner wall after soaking, rinsed with clean water, and then inverted and dried to prevent mold. After drying, add new bait again and it can be reused.

【Non Toxic and Safe Wasp Killers】 The wasp trap is made of non-toxic, transparent, and integrated plastic material. Its sturdy structure ensures its reliability even under outdoor conditions, effectively capturing insects such as bees and wasps without the need for insecticides, without harming family and pets, protecting the natural environment, and enjoying a comfortable outdoor life.

【Attracting Wasps with Natural Ingredients】 These insects will be attracted by added sugar attractants and enter the wasp traps outdoor hanging yellowjacket, Mix sugar with water (1:2) or dilute honey, add a small amount of vinegar and a small amount of overripe fruit, and pour it into the wasp trap. The wasps are sweet and the fermented fruit aroma can attract them from a distance, producing an irresistible odor, and they will be submerged in water. It is recommended to replace it every week to avoid deterioration.

【Effective and Durable Wasp Trap Catcher】The wasp trap is designed with dual entrances, one on each side, increasing the chances of attracting insects into the device, improving efficiency, and eliminating annoying insects. Resistant to moisture, high temperature, low temperature, and can withstand various weather conditions. A very simple and effective solution.

【Widely Used Flying Insect Traps】Our bee trap can be easily applied to different outdoor scenes, such as farms, terraces, gardens, orchards, camping, etc. It helps you solve insect problems, effectively isolates rain, snow, and water, and can protect you from wasp infestation from spring to autumn.
